name: Confit of Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the sugar and simmer until it begins to turn golden brown and caramelized.
3. Add the brandy and lemon juice to the pan and continue to simmer.
4. Peel, core, and halve the apples.
5. Place the apples in the caramel mixture and cook slowly until they are caramelized and tender.
6. Serve warm.
Yield: 8 servings
